base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of cutscene_part_01 — a ui from 1988 ninja gaiden. Opening — Ryu vs Ken silhouette-duel under moon. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
